description: Cambrian Frontend Manifest — expected pages, components, and behaviors

discover.description: Browse tracks with filters. Song cards display creator username, not email.

catalog.description: Full catalog with pagination, sorting, and filters.

trackDetail.description: Single track detail page. Creator username links to profile.

creatorProfile.description: Public creator profile with bio, avatar, banner, tracks, collections.

upload.description: Track upload form. Must handle 409 duplicate error with clear UX message.

settings.description: User settings. Email shown here (private, auth-scoped).

songCard.description: Displays track info. Shows artist (creatorUsername). Clicking username navigates to /creator/{creatorSlug}.

behavior.creatorLink: If creatorSlug is non-null, clicking creatorUsername navigates to /creator/{creatorSlug}. If null, username is plain text.
behavior.profileImage: If creatorProfileImageUrl is non-null, show it. Otherwise render a default avatar placeholder.
behavior.artist: Display creatorUsername (or artist). NEVER display email.

behavior.defaultAvatar: If profileImageUrl is null, render a default avatar.
behavior.email: NEVER display email on this page.

behavior.duplicateError: On 409 response, show: 'You have already uploaded this audio file.' with the existing track title.
behavior.validation: Audio: mp3/wav/flac/aac/ogg/m4a, max 100MB. Cover art: jpg/png/webp, max 10MB.

policies.publicIdentity: Creator public identity = displayName or username prefix. NEVER email.
policies.defaultAvatar: When profileImageUrl is null, render a generic avatar SVG/PNG.
policies.duplicateUpload: Show 409 error clearly. Do not retry silently.
